title: Kaiju-Craft
description: a Mod Based off... Kaiju No 8
body:
Kaiju-craft (Alpha Release)

Dive into the world of Kaiju No. 8 in Minecraft with this early version of the mod! Designed for fans of the anime and manga, this mod brings key features from the series into the game with exciting mechanics and visuals.

Current Features:

Defense Force Arsenal
Equip yourself with custom-modeled weapons and armor used by the Defense Force. These tools are designed for fast-paced combat and will help you take on powerful Kaiju threats.

Mushroom Kaiju
Encounter the Mushroom Kaiju, a custom mob inspired by the creatures in the series. It’s tough, aggressive, and brings a real Kaiju-style challenge to your world.

Movement & Combat Mechanics
Move like a real Defense Force soldier with:

Sliding – Quickly slide across the ground to dodge or close gaps.

Dashing – Burst forward at high speed to dodge attacks or charge into battle.

Overcharging – Temporarily boost your strength and speed for powerful attacks.
All mechanics feature custom animations to make your actions feel smooth and cinematic.

This is just the beginning! More Kaiju, abilities, and story elements will be added in future updates. Try it out and experience the early stages of the Kaiju No. 8 universe in Minecraft.
